channel.title: ProjectPrice Live Video Feed
channel.description: Project Price rotating short-form video feed for realtor and buyer estimate strategy.

item.title: First-time buyer coaching scenario | hidden repair cost risks in a starter home | offer reduction with Project Price estimate ranges
item.description: Project Price short-form video: First-time buyer coaching scenario | hidden repair cost risks in a starter home | offer reduction with Project Price estimate ranges. Realtor-led buyer guidance with immediate estimate ranges and repair negotiation context.
